component.name: DiskMaster
component.summary: Monitor HDD/SSD/NVMe health, temperature and S.M.A.R.T. data

description.p: DiskMaster is a desktop monitor for disk health, temperature and S.M.A.R.T. data with a Hard Disk Sentinel-style interface: per-disk cards, history charts, self-tests and threshold alerts. It reads data via smartctl, sysfs, nvme-cli and (optionally) the HDSentinel CLI.
The proprietary HDSentinel binary is not bundled; install it separately to enable that backend. smartctl works out of the box.
